vocab.meaning: thực hành chánh niệm (tập trung vào hiện tại để giảm căng thẳng)
vocab.example: To avoid getting stressed, I try to exercise mindfulness by focusing on my breathing while the cars are stationary.

vocab.meaning: việc đi lại bị đình trệ (do tắc đường)
vocab.example: I often transform a stagnant commute into a learning opportunity by listening to educational audiobooks.

vocab.meaning: giảm bớt sự khó chịu/bực bội
vocab.example: Listening to classical music helps to mitigate the irritation caused by the endless honking of horns.

vocab.meaning: một sự phiền toái không thể tránh khỏi
vocab.example: I've come to view traffic jams as an inevitable nuisance of urban life, so I no longer let them ruin my mood.

vocab.meaning: bị giam chân/gò bó trong một không gian hẹp
vocab.example: Being cooped up in a vehicle for hours is the perfect time for me to catch up on long-form journalism.

vocab.meaning: sự tham gia của trí tuệ/hoạt động trí não
vocab.example: I maintain cognitive engagement by solving mental riddles or planning my schedule for the upcoming week.
Instead of venting my frustration by shouting, I prefer to call a friend and have a pleasant chat to pass the time.

vocab.meaning: có hại cho năng suất (làm giảm hiệu quả công việc)
vocab.example: Although gridlock is detrimental to productivity, I use the time to practice my pronunciation for English exams.
I constantly monitor a navigational app to see if there is any progress in the traffic flow ahead.

vocab.meaning: không bị ảnh hưởng bởi sự hỗn loạn (xung quanh)
vocab.example: With my high-quality noise-canceling headphones, I remain almost impervious to the chaos of the road outside.
